sections.changelog:
4.5.1

  • Fix: plugin upgrade detection now reads version from partner config so clear_page_cache_on_upgrade actually fires on release

    • 4.5.0

    • Switch to WordPress-native injection (empty selector + prepend) for reliable server-side player injection on every article
    • Enable automatic WP Rocket page cache purge on plugin upgrade so cached HTML is regenerated with the player
